message:
Fix outdated documentation and misleading comments

- Fix doc examples in lib.rs and evaluator.rs to show correct 4-parameter
  evaluate_command() signature with compiled_overrides
- Fix misleading comment in hook.rs chrono_lite_timestamp() that claimed
  to return ISO format when it actually returns Unix epoch seconds
- Integrate sanitize_for_pattern_matching() in evaluator to reduce false
  positives by stripping safe string arguments before pattern matching

All 161 unit tests + 137 e2e tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
